sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69029" key="muqistoriko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡθ-ιστορικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n69029.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing fabulous history, volumina</tr_> Vopisc.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Firm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
